concerns.text: T034 makes pilot study MANDATORY with citation as fallback only. Spec FR-011 states 'pilot study (n≥50...r≥0.5) OR cite peer-reviewed source' — the OR condition allows citation as a primary path, not just a failure fallback. This weakens the spec's flexibility.

T034 adds a citation fallback but omits the Reference-Validator Agent verification required by Constitution Principle II ('Every external citation...MUST be verified by the Reference-Validator Agent'). This is a constitution violation at the task level.

T011 says 'record their URLs in plan.md, and update the amendment-status section after review' but plan.md states 'Track amendment status in state/projects/...yaml'. Minor inconsistency in tracking location — should align with plan.md's directive.
